details: All 1st to 4th Job skills can be maxed
Put one SP into each skill first and then max each skill in this order
For any skills that have prerequisites, follow them first before following build path

credits: Hyper Passive Build + Inner Ability + Boost Nodes Build

extraContent.title: Shikigami
content: Kanna uses summons called Shikigami that attack enemies on their own. Kanna can use [Order] or [Spirit] skills to command the Shikigami to use an attack from their position. Pressing the Down Arrow Key and Skill Key together will instead cast the attack from your position
Each Shikigami have a set of attack skills and passive effects called Traits that either empower Kanna or other Shikigami

When a Shikigami activates a skill, there is a chance to grant [Resonance] to another Shikigami that allows an [Order] skill to be used regardless if the Shikigami is summoned. This resonated [Order] skill will not trigger a cooldown

The following Shikigami grant [Resonance] for the following Shikigami:<bp_<tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/summon-oni.png} tip={Summon Oni (1st Job)}> Oni grants to <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/summon-tengu.png} tip={Summon Tengu (3rd Job)}> Tengu_<tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/summon-tengu.png} tip={Summon Tengu (3rd Job)}> Tengu grants to <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/summon-orochi.png} tip={Summon Orochi (4th Job)}> Orochi_<tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/summon-orochi.png} tip={Summon Orochi (4th Job)}> Orochi grants to <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/summon-oni.png} tip={Summon Oni (1st Job)}> Oni_>
Kanna's gauge will display each Shikigami's remaining duration and displays a glowing icon when [Resonance] is available

primary.name: Blessing of the Five Elements
primary.shortDesc: Permanently increases Max HP by 15%, Max MP by 15%, and decreases Damage Taken by 30%.

primary.name: Hand of Fate
primary.shortDesc: Spirit Walker Fan Mastery: +40%

primary.name: Return of the Five Planets
primary.shortDesc: Returns you to Momijigaoka\nCooldown 600 sec

primary.name: Haku the Familiar
primary.shortDesc: The first use summons Haku as a fox. Subsequent uses transforms Haku into human form, then dismisses the summon.\nCooldown: 3 sec.
primary.desc: Allows you to hide/show Haku visual effect
details: Using the skill will cycle between fox form, human form, and dismissing Haku

primary.name: Hero's Echo
primary.shortDesc: Increases Attack Power & Magic ATT by 4% for 2400 sec\nCooldown: 300 sec
details: To obtain this skill, complete the quest <link href={https://maplestorywiki.net/w/Quests/58/Spiritual_Release} title={"Spiritual Release"}>
Affects all nearby players

primary.name: Soul-Shatter Talisman: Scores
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 10\nMax Enemies Hit: 4, Damage: 40%, Number of Attacks: 6
primary.desc: Cast forward damaging charms

primary.name: Commune
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 20\nEnters Commune mode.\nCooldown: 180 sec.
primary.desc: When used, displays a short conversation with a chosen Shikigami
details: Can only be used in town

primary.name: Leap Talisman
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 20, Teleport horizontally a distance of 300, or vertically a distance of 400\n[Passive Effects]: Speed: +22, Max Speed: +20
primary.desc: Teleport in the direction you are moving using the Arrow Keys
details: Can be used in the air and on ladders
When in town, pressing the Skill Key without any Arrow Keys teleports you to a random location within the map

primary.name: Summon Oni
primary.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 40, Summon Duration: 55 sec.
Celestial Strike: Swing a massive club to attack. Max Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 45%, Number of Attacks: 6
Leaping Strike: Leap into the air and slam down on the target location. Max Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 100%, Number of Attacks: 6
Cooldown:  60 sec.
primary.desc: Summon Oni to attack nearby enemies using a club
details: Oni will periodically use the following attacks:<bp_[Celestial Strike]: Oni swings forward_[Leaping Strike]: Oni leaps to nearby enemies and strikes downwards_>
Unaffected by Damage Reflect, cooldown resets, and %Summon Duration
Right-clicking the skill will toggle ON/OFF the <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/shikigami-master.png} tip={Shikigami Master (4th Job)}> Resonance visual effect

primary.name: Crimson Covenant
primary.shortDesc: Blessing of Recovery: While Oni is summoned, restores 3% of your Max HP/MP every 3 seconds. Grants a 60% chance to recover 3% of your Max HP/MP when any Shikigami lands an attack on an enemy.
details: Oni now gains the following skills:<bp_[Blessing of Recovery]: While summoned, periodically restore %Max HP/MP and successful attacks from any Shikigami will restore %Max HP/MP_>

primary.name: Clear Mind
primary.shortDesc: Knockback Resistance: +30%, Damage Taken: -70%

primary.name: Eternal Bonds
primary.shortDesc: Speed: +20, LUK: +30\nMP Absorb Chance: 20%, Amount Absorbed: 5% of Max MP, Amount Absorbed: 3% of the boss's Max MP (including Shikigami attacks)
primary.desc: Successful attacks have a chance to steal a portion of the enemy's %Max HP
details: Effectiveness is reduced for bosses

primary.name: Spiritual Enlightenment
primary.shortDesc: INT: +40, DEF: +400, Max MP: +20%, MP increases by 120 per level

primary.name: Soul-Shatter Talisman: Icon
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 20\nMax Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 75%, Number of Attacks: 6
details: Increases Max Enemies Hit and %Damage of attack

primary.name: Evil's End Talisman
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 25\nMax Enemies Hit: 7, Damage: 180%, Number of Attacks: 6\nCooldown: 8 sec.
primary.desc: Release a circle of talisman around yourself

primary.name: [Order] Spinning Strike
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 30\nSpinning Strike: Take a step forward and, at the same time, spin a massive club 2 times in a row. Max Enemies Hit: 12, Damage: 170%, Number of Attacks: 8, Strike Activations: 3\nCooldown: 12 sec.
primary.desc: While summoned, command <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/summon-oni.png} tip={Summon Oni (1st Job)}> Oni to swing forward
details: Pressing the Down Arrow Key and Skill Key together performs the attack in front of you
Unaffected by cooldown resets and cooldown reduction

primary.name: Peacock's Plumage
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 20\nDuration: 200 sec., Attack Speed: +2

primary.name: Crimson Covenant II
primary.shortDesc: Celestial Strike: Swing a massive club to attack. Max Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 70%, Number of Attacks: 6\nLeaping Strike: Leap into the air and slam down at the target location. Max Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 130%, Number of Attacks: 6\nCrimson Flame: While Oni is summoned, Normal Enemy Damage of All Shikigami: +60%
details: Increases %Damage of [Celestial Strike] and [Leaping Strike]
Oni now gains the following skills:<bp_[Crimson Flame]: While summoned, increases %Damage to regular monsters for all Shikigami_>

primary.name: Ayanokouji Bloodline
primary.shortDesc: Permanently increases EXP by 10%

primary.name: Soul-Shatter Talisman: Spirit
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 30\nMax Enemies Hit: 7, Damage: 120%, Number of Attacks: 6
details: Increases Max Enemies Hit and %Damage of attack

primary.name: Summon Tengu
primary.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 50, Summon Duration: 25 sec.
Known Skills
Piercing Shot: Fires an arrow in the direction of the target that penetrates enemies in its path. Max Enemies Hit: 10, Damage: 560%, Number of Attacks: 10
Traits
Intense Gaze: All of Tengu's attacks ignore 100% of the enemy's defense.
While Tengu is on the battlefield, all Shikigami attacks ignore an addtional 30% of the enemy's defense.
Cooldown: 60 sec.
primary.desc: Summon Tengu to attack nearby enemies using a bow
details: Tengu will periodically use the following attack:<bp_[Piercing Shot]: Fire an arrow at a target that damages all enemies in its path_>
While summoned, Tengu grants the following effects:<bp_[Intense Gaze]: Tengu's attacks have 100% Ignore DEF and all Shikigami attacks gain increased %Ignore DEF_>
Unaffected by Damage Reflect, cooldown resets, and %Summon Duration
Right-clicking the skill will toggle ON/OFF the <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/shikigami-master.png} tip={Shikigami Master (4th Job)}> Resonance visual effect

primary.name: Shikigami Charm
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 20, jump in mid-air to go farther.\nCan use Leap Talisman once without a platform before landing
primary.desc: Up jump skill
details: Pressing the Up Arrow Key and Jump Key together in the air will perform an Up Jump<bp_Teleport can be used without a platform once before landing_>

primary.name: Barrier: Curse Ward
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 40\nInvincibility: 3 sec.\nCooldown: 60 sec.
primary.desc: When used, briefly become invincible
details: Unaffected by cooldown reset and %Buff Duration

primary.name: [Order] Standby
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 30\nPlace all Shikigami on standby\nCooldown: 1 sec.
primary.desc: While toggled, all Shikigami enter Standby mode and will not attack
details: Using an [Order] or [Spirit] Skill will turn off Standby mode
Right-clicking the skill will toggle ON/OFF the visual effect

primary.name: Crimson Covenant III
primary.shortDesc:
Celestial Strike: Swing a massive club to attack. Max Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 130%, Number of Attacks: 6
Leaping Strike: Leap into the air and slam down at the target location. Max Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 230%, Number of Attacks: 6
Explosive Soul: Charge the enemy with explosive power. Max Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 230%, Number of Attacks: 6
Berserk: Grants 10 stacks when Oni is summoned. Oni gains +2% Final Damage per stack. 1 stack is removed every 5 seconds when on standby. Gain stacks when attacking the enemy. (Max Berserk Stacks: 10)
details: Increases %Damage of [Celestial Strike] and [Leaping Strike]

Oni now gains the following skills:<bp_[Explosive Soul]: Oni periodically dashes towards and attack nearby enemies_[Berserk]: Oni gains a stacking %Final Damage buff (up to 10) that slowly decreases while in Standby mode and increases on successful Oni attacks_Upon summoning, Oni gains full stacks of [Berserk]_>

primary.name: Obsidian Feather
primary.shortDesc: Keen Hunter: While Tengu is summoned, all Shikigami Boss Damage increases by 30%.
details: Tengu now gains the following skill:<bp_[Keen Hunter]: While summoned, increases %Boss Damage of all Shikigami_>

primary.name: Spirit Path
primary.shortDesc: Magic ATT: +30, Critical Rate: +40%, Critical Damage: +20%

primary.name: Unshakeable Faith
primary.shortDesc: Status Resistance: +30, Knockback Resistance: +70%

primary.name: Soul-Shatter Talisman: Dance
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 40\nMax Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 200%, Number of Attacks: 6
details: Increases Max Enemies Hit and %Damage of attack

primary.name: Barrier: Spirit Chains
primary.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 100
Damage: 140%, Max Enemies Hit: 1, Number of Attacks: 6. Stun Duration: 10 sec., Stun duration can increase up to 100% based on the damage inflicted by the skill.
Afterward
Duration: 10 sec., Damage: 140%, Max Enemies Hit: 8, Number of Attacks: 6
Cooldown: 120 sec.
primary.desc: Cast a bind on a single enemy and place down a talisman that damages enemies within
details: Skill only activates when a target is nearby and targets the enemy with the highest Max HP
Unaffected by cooldown resets

primary.name: Heart-Wreck Talisman
primary.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 60
Duration: 3 sec., Damage: 240%, Max Enemies Hit: 12, Number of Attacks: 6 within area.
Applies a debuff to hit enemies that increases damage taken from Shikigami by 20% for 60 sec.
Cooldown: 30 sec.
primary.desc: Cast forward an expanding talisman that damages and debuffs enemies within it
details: [Debuff]: Enemy takes increased %Damage from Shikigami

primary.name: Summon Orochi
primary.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 80, Summon Duration: 25 sec.
Known Skills
Dance of Poison: Max Enemies Hit:  6, Damage: 380%, Number of Attacks: 12. Applies Poison to hit enemies. Poison Damage: 75%, Damage Interval: 1 sec., Bonus Damage to Normal Enemies: +50% (additive)
Shadow Cleave: Max Enemies Hit: 7, Damage: 440%, Number of Attacks: 8. Applies Poison to hit enemies.
Traits
Dignity: While Orochi is summoned, decreases your damage taken from attacks by 30%, including damage based on your Max HP ratio.
Poison Shift: While Orochi is summoned, poison enemies spread Poison to up to 3 other targets within range at a set interval.
Cooldown: 120 sec.
primary.desc: Summon Orochi to attack nearby enemies using chained scythes that apply a stacking damaging [Poison] debuff (up to 10)
details: Orochi will periodically use the following attack:<bp_[Dance of Poison]: Orochi cleaves forward_[Shadow Cleave]: Orochi strikes forward in a large area_>

While summoned, Orochi grants the following effects:<bp_[Dignity]: Reduces damage taken including %Max HP attacks_[Poison Shift]: Enemies inflicted with [Poison] periodically spread the debuff to nearby enemies_>
Unaffected by Damage Reflect, cooldown resets, and %Summon Duration
Right-clicking the skill will toggle ON/OFF the <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/shikigami-master.png} tip={Shikigami Master (4th Job)}> Resonance visual effect

primary.name: Akatsuki Warrior
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 70, creates a Sengoku Warrior emblem\n[Passive Effect: All stats with a direct AP investment increase by 15%]
details: Skill is a passive, the active effect does nothing except displays an animation

primary.name: Hero's Will
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 30, Removes all abnormal status effects.\nCooldown: 300 sec
primary.desc: Removes certain abnormal status effects and become immune to Abnormal Status for a few seconds

primary.name: Call of Unity
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 60\nCall of Unity Duration: 20 sec., Critical Rate: +5% per stack, Damage: +12% per stack.\nCooldown: 60 sec.
primary.desc: While active, grants a stacking %Crit Rate and %Damage buff for each summoned Shikigami (up to 3)
details: Unaffected by cooldwon resets and %Buff Duration

primary.name: [Order] Execute
primary.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 100
Execute: Move above the target's head and let chained scythes fall like a guillotine. Max Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 550%, Number of Attacks: 12, Chase Cuts: 10
Damage to Targets with 10 Poison Stacks: +30%
Cooldown: 30 sec.
primary.desc: While summoned, command <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/summon-orochi.png} tip={Summon Orochi (4th Job)}> Orochi to move toward a target and strike downwards
details: Deals increased %Damage if the target has 10 stacks of [Poison]
Pressing the Down Arrow Key and Skill Key together performs the attack in front of you
Unaffected by cooldown resets and cooldown reduction

primary.name: [Order] Shade-Fletched Arrow
primary.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 100
Shade-Fletched Arrow: Aim at an enemy. While aiming, obsidian feathers gather at the arrowhead, and fly when the arrow is released. Max Enemies Hit: 12, Damage: 230%, Number of Attacks: 8, Activates 6 Black Shockwaves
Final Damage To Target: +50%
Cooldown: 30 sec.
primary.desc: While summoned, command <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/summon-tengu.png} tip={Summon Tengu (3rd Job)}> Tengu to aim and fire an arrow towards a targetted enemy that damages enemies in its path
details: Deals increased %Final Damage towards targetted enemy
Pressing the Down Arrow Key and Skill Key together performs the attack in front of you
Unaffected by cooldown resets and cooldown reduction

primary.name: Ivory Fang
primary.shortDesc: Lofty View: While Orochi is summoned, Kanna enters the Lofty stance.\nOverwhelming Force: While Orochi is summoned, the Final Damage of all Shikigami increases by 30%.
details: Orochi now gains the following skill:<bp_[Lofty View]: While summoned, enter [Lofty] stance where you will not be knocked back at all (Super Knockback Resistance)_[Overwhelming Force]: While summoned, increases %Final Damage of all Shikigami_>

primary.name: Obsidian Feather II
primary.shortDesc: Piercing Shot: Fires an arrow in the direction of the target that pierces through enemies in its path. Max Enemies Hit: 10, Damage: 800%, Number of Attacks: 10\nSteady Aim: Increases the cooldown of Tengu's skills by 5 sec., but also increases Order skill Final Damage by 100%.\nRain of Darkness: When Tengu is summoned, she gains 1 stack of Rain of Darkness. Stacks can be consumed to immediately use Tengu's skills that are on cooldown.
details: Increases %Damage of [Piercing Shot]

Tengu now gains the following skill:<bp_[Steady Aim]:  Increases the cooldown of Tengu's skills but also increases %Final Damage of Tengu [Order] Skills_[Rain of Darkness]: Upon summon, grants a stack of [Rain of Darkness] that can be consumed to use a Tengu [Order] skill that is on cooldown_>

primary.name: Crimson Covenant IV
primary.shortDesc:
Celestial Strike: Swing a massive club to attack. Max Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 250%, Number of Attacks: 6
Leaping Strike: Leap into the air and slam down at the target location. Max Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 380%, Number of Attacks: 6
Explosive Soul: Charge the enemy with explosive power. Max Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 380%, Number of Attacks: 6
Strongarm: Decreases the cooldown of Oni's Order skills by 1 sec. each time she uses an Order skill.
details: Increases %Damage of [Celestial Strike], [Leaping Strike], and [Explosive Soul]
Oni now gains the following skill:<bp_[Strongarm]: Upon using an Oni [Order] Skill, decreases the cooldown of Oni [Order] Skills_>

primary.name: Shikigami Master
primary.shortDesc:
When Oni activates a skill, Tengu has a chance to Resonate.
When Tengu activates a skill, Orochi has a chance to Resonate.
When Orochi activates a skill, Oni has a chance to Resonate.
Resonance: Shikigami that Resonate will be able to use one of their Order skills, whether or not they are summoned. Order skills that are activated with the Resonance effect are treated as different skills than their default versions and don't have a cooldown.
Each Shikigami can have up to 2 stacks of Resonance.
primary.desc: When a Shikigami activates a skill, there is a chance to grant [Resonance] to another Shikigami
details: [Resonance]: Allows an [Order] Skill to be used regardless if Shikigami is summoned<bp_Using a Resonated [Order] Skill will not trigger a cooldown_Each Shikigami can have up to 2 stacks of [Resonance]_>

The following Shikigami grant [Resonance] for the following Shikigami:<bp_<tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/summon-oni.png} tip={Summon Oni (1st Job)}> Oni grants to <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/summon-tengu.png} tip={Summon Tengu (3rd Job)}> Tengu_<tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/summon-tengu.png} tip={Summon Tengu (3rd Job)}> Tengu grants to <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/summon-orochi.png} tip={Summon Orochi (4th Job)}> Orochi_<tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/summon-orochi.png} tip={Summon Orochi (4th Job)}> Orochi grants to <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/summon-oni.png} tip={Summon Oni (1st Job)}> Oni_>

primary.name: Kasen
primary.shortDesc: Attack Speed: +1, Damage: +30%, Sprit Walker Fan Mastery: +70%

hyperActive.name: True Name Revelation
hyperActive.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 150, Duration of All Shikigami Trait Enhancements: 30 sec.
Rakuya, Crimson Queen
While Rakuya is summoned, her traits are enhanced.
Blessing of Recovery: 100% chance to restore your HP/MP each time a Shikigami attack lands.
Crimson Flame: +20% Normal Enemy Damage
Berserk: +1% Final Damage per Berserk Stack
Strongarm: Additional 0.5 sec. Cooldown Reduction
Haneka, Storm Princess
While Haneka is summoned, her traits are enhanced.
Intense Gaze: +10% Ignore Defense for other Shikigami.
Keen Hunter: +10% Boss Damage for other Shikigami.
Steady Aim: +10% Final Damage Effect
Back Rain: +1 Black Rain Stack Immediately
Yuina, Empress of Calamity
While Yuina is summoned, her traits are enhanced.
Dignity: +5% Damage Taken Reduction
Poison Shift: -1 sec. Poison Shift Interval
Lofty View: Also defends against debilitating status conditions.
Overwhelming Force: +5% Final Damage to all Shikigami
Cooldown: 120 sec.
hyperActive.desc: While active, enhances the Traits of each Shikigami
details: <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/summon-oni.png} tip={Summon Oni (1st Job)}> [Oni - Rakuya]:<bp_[Blessing of Recovery]: Guaranteed chance to restore %Max HP/MP on successful Shikigami attack_[Crimson Flame]: Increase %Damage to regular monsters provided_[Berserk]: Increases %Final Damage provided per stack_[Strongarm]: Increases cooldown reduction provided_>

<tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/summon-tengu.png} tip={Summon Tengu (3rd Job)}> [Haneka - Tengu]:<bp_[Intense Gaze]: Increases %Ignore DEF provided for other Shikigami_[Keen Hunter]: Increases %Boss Damage provided for other Shikigami_[Steady Aim]: Increases amount of %Final Damage provided_[Rain of Darkness]: Grants additional stack_>

<tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/summon-orochi.png} tip={Summon Orochi (4th Job)}> [Yuina - Orochi]:<bp_[Dignity]: Increases damage reduction provided_[Poison Shift]: Reduces the interval when [Poison] is spread_[Lofty View]: Now also blocks debilitating status conditions_[Overwhelming Force]: Increases %Final Damage provided to all Shikigami_>
Unaffected by cooldown resets and %Buff Duration

hyperActive.name: Akatsuki Blessing
hyperActive.shortDesc: MP Cost: 100, Duration: 60 sec, Damage: 10%\nApplies to any Sengoku Warrior class in the party.\nCooldown: 120 sec

fifthMain.name: [Spirit] Hakumenkonmou Juubi
fifthMain.shortDesc: MP Cost: 1000, Haku Awakening Duration: 15 sec., Max Enemies Hit: 12, Damage: 710%, Number of Attacks: 12, Light Shockwave Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 700%, Number of Attacks: 10, Finishing Blow Max Enemies Hit: 14, Damage: 830%, Number of Attacks: 14, Light Shockwaves: 32\nCooldown: 120 sec.
fifthMain.desc: Summon Haku to release light shockwaves at enemies in a large area before releasing a finishing blow
details: <tt src={http://localhost:3000/grandislibrary/class-icons/sengoku/kanna/spirit-hakumenkonmou-juubi-final-blow.png} tip={[Spirit] Hakumenkonmou Juubi - Finishing Blow (5th Job)}> [Finishing Blow]: Release an explosive final attack<bp_Attack activates when the summon expires or when the Skill Key is pressed again_Invincible while casting_>

fifthMain.shortDesc: MP Cost: 1000\nDuration: 30 sec., Oni Final Damage: +30%, Oni Order Skill Cooldown: -20%\nCooldown: 120 sec.

masteryCore.name: HEXA Summon Oni
masteryCore.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 60, Summon Duration: 55 sec.
Known Skills
HEXA Celestial Strike: Swing a massive club to attack. Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 380%, Number of Attacks: 6
HEXA Leaping Strike: Leap into the air and slam down at the target location. Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 900%, Number of Attacks: 6
HEXA Explosive Soul: Charge the enemy with explosive power. Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 900%, Number of Attacks: 6
Traits
Blessing of Recovery: While Oni is summoned, restores 3% of your Max HP/MP every 3 seconds. Grants 60% chance to recover 3% of your Max HP/MP when any Shikigami lands an attack on an enemy.
Crimson Flame: While Oni is summoned, Normal Enemy Damage of All Shikigami: +60%
Berserk: Gain 10 stacks when Oni is summoned to the battlefield. Oni gains +2% Final Damage per stack, and 1 stack is removed every 5 seconds when on standby. Gain stacks when attacking the enemy. (Stacks up to 10 times.)
Strongarm: Decreases cooldown of all of Oni's Order skills by 1 sec. each time Oni uses an Order skill.
Cooldown: 60 sec.
details: Unlocked with 2nd Mastery Node

masteryCore.name: HEXA [Order] Spinning Strike
masteryCore.shortDesc: MP Cost: 60\nHEXA Spinning Strike: Take a step forward and, at the same time, spin a massive club 2 times in a row. Max Enemies Hit: 12, Damage: 550%,  Number of Attacks: 8, Strike Activations: 6\nCooldown: 12 sec.
details: Unlocked with 2nd Mastery Node

masteryCore.name: HEXA [Order] Pulverizing Strike
masteryCore.shortDesc: MP Cost: 300\nHEXA Pulverizing Strike: Lift the club high over the head and swing downwards with force. Max Enemies Hit: 14, Damage: 850%, Number of Attacks: 12, Strike Activations: 12\nCooldown: 30 sec.
details: Unlocked with 2nd Mastery Node

Known Skills

meta: Kanna is a INT mage class part of the Sengoku class group. Kanna uses Fans as their primary weapons. For their secondary weapon, Kanna can equip Talismans
